name: Mrs. Locker's Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir all the sugar mix ingredients together and bring to a boil over low flame (use a candy thermometer).
2. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
3. In a separate bowl, melt the semi-sweet chocolate using 80°C setting on your microwave or a double boiler.
4. Once melted, add the chocolate mixture to the cooled sugar mixture and stir until well combined.
5. Pour the mixture into a greased baking pan.
6. Allow the fudge to cool completely before cutting it into squares.
7. Refrigerate for best results.
Date: Thursday, September 12, 1996
